name: Cable (Marvel)
description: Cable is a Marvel Comics character who appears in X-Force and X-Men comics. He is the son of Cyclops and a clone of Jean Grey, and was raised by Apocalypse dissidents in the future. Cable has telepathic and telekinetic abilities, including mind reading and object movement. He can also manipulate others' thoughts and bodily functions, and disassemble objects or create force fields
creator: Eve_07
